introduction.news: 🎉 A new technology watch has been written !
introduction.title: Hi, I'm
introduction.description: I’m actually in the second year of my BTS at Saint-Adjutor which is located at Vernon. I would like to move towards the web application development in the near future.

console.title: Console
console.description: Here is a console that allows you to contact me. You can use the following commands:

commands.error: is not recognized as a cmdlet, type 'help' to display the list of available commands
commands.help: Availables commands are : vim, regex, clear
commands.vim: The mouse was invented in 1963 by Douglas Engelbart of the Stanford Research Institute and introduced to the public in 1968.
commands.regex: Day 1: *Typing regex for email*, 10 years later : *Typing regex for email*
commands.social: Show links to my social networks
commands.projects: Show the list of my projects
commands.technology_watch: Show the list of my technology watches
commands.training_period: Show the list of my stages
commands.certification: Show the list of my certifications
